name: NASA
description: NASA explores space, studies Earth, and sends astronauts and spacecraft on science missions.

name: ISRO
description: ISRO builds rockets and satellites and leads Indian missions such as Chandrayaan and Mangalyaan.

name: SpaceX
description: SpaceX is a private company that builds reusable rockets and spacecraft.

name: ESA
description: The European Space Agency works with many European countries on space science and exploration.

name: JAXA
description: JAXA is Japan's space agency and works on rockets, satellites, astronauts, and asteroid missions.
